LanguageData.ABY_LitanyGrinder.label: litany grinder
LanguageData.ABY_LitanyGrinder.description: A horde-pattern infernal rotary gun forged from condensed war-lattice fragments. It trades armor finesse and elegance for disciplined volume of fire, chewing through exposed infantry and breach swarms in a relentless ember-lit stream.
LanguageData.ABY_LitanyRoundProjectile.label: litany round
